hypotheses.name: GO and TRRUST enrichment of 14 diverging genes
hypotheses.method: Mann-Whitney AUROC (div vs conv trajectory slope); mygene API GO BP terms for 14 diverging genes (FOS, JUNB, TNF, PTGS2, HLA-A, HLA-DPB1, KLF6, LDHA, LGALS1, NCAM1, NCOA3, NR4A3, PAX5, TBXAS1). Slope computed as Spearman rho(layer, dist-to-centroid) per gene over 12 layers.
hypotheses.result_value: AUROC=1.000, p=2.34e-11; top GO: NF-kB (8), immune response (7), inflammatory (4); 379 unique GO BP terms
hypotheses.next_action: Reinterpret: GO enrichment confirms OOV genes are immune/stress-response genes. Retire as OOV artifact. Focus future analyses on 195 in-vocabulary genes.

hypotheses.name: Layer-of-bifurcation anatomy (inter/intra ratio)
hypotheses.method: For each of 12 layers, compute centroid-centroid distance between diverging (n=14) and converging (n=195) gene clusters. Compute intra-group variance (mean dist to own centroid). Report separation ratio = inter / mean(intra). Identify layer where ratio peaks (bifurcation layer).
hypotheses.result_value: rho=1.000, p=0.0; L0 ratio=3.13, L11 ratio=11.44; intra_div=0.000 at ALL layers
hypotheses.next_action: Retire diverging-gene analyses. All 14 genes have zero L0 embedding (OOV) and identical embeddings at every layer. The apparent bifurcation is OOV token collapse, not learned geometry.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: OOV artifact: all 14 diverging genes have zero L0 norm; they are processed identically by scGPT at all layers, producing a collapsed single point unrelated to biological geometry

hypotheses.name: Trajectory slope vs STRING degree (continuous)
hypotheses.method: Per-gene trajectory slope = Spearman rho(layer, dist-to-centroid). Spearman correlation between slope and STRING degree/weighted-degree for all 209 named genes. Quartile comparison (Q75 high vs Q25 low degree slopes).
hypotheses.result_value: rho=+0.018, p=0.793; high-deg slope=-0.803, low-deg slope=-0.882; AUROC=0.525, p=0.683
hypotheses.next_action: Retire slope-vs-degree hypothesis. No correlation found. Note: trajectory slopes are dominated by OOV split artifact. Retest on 195 in-vocab genes only after removing OOV genes.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: No correlation between STRING degree and trajectory slope (rho=+0.018, p=0.793). Likely confounded by OOV gene artifact.

hypotheses.name: OOV gene discovery in scGPT named gene set
hypotheses.method: Check L0 embedding L2 norm for all 209 named genes. Identify genes with zero-norm embeddings (OOV/unknown token). Confirm pairwise identity of zero-norm genes across all layers.
hypotheses.result_value: 14/209 (6.7%) genes are OOV: FOS, HLA-A, HLA-DPB1, JUNB, KLF6, LDHA, LGALS1, NCAM1, NCOA3, NR4A3, PAX5, PTGS2, TBXAS1, TNF. All identical at ALL 12 layers.
hypotheses.next_action: CRITICAL: Rerun ALL geometric analyses (kNN graph, spectral gap, STRING distance, manifold distance, intrinsic dimensionality) on 195 in-vocabulary named genes ONLY. Remove OOV genes from all future experiments.
